SUBJECT: Affiliate: another bonus + $2MM

NAME,

Hey - it's Jeff Walker. I'm back, and I don't know if I'll let Tom at the controls anymore... I can't believe he called me a "rat bastard"
yesterday!   ;-)

At this point, I have only one thing to say...
we are COMPLETELY on fire. This thing is RED HOT. Check it out...

We are now closing in an $2 million in sales...
as I write this we are at $1.87 million. In the last 24 hours (the third day of the launch) we sold $396,744.00.

You know that means one thing... HUGE
COMMISSIONS.

And there's a long way to go. In fact, based on past launches I've done I'm estimating there's another $1.1 million sales between now and when we shut things down on Friday.

The money is out there... all you have to do is hit the "send" button.

REMEMBER, things are wide open for today's special Bonus Prize... the Yamaha YSP3000B Digital Sound Projector (google it, this thing's amazing).

The affiliate who makes the most sales TODAY (Monday, January 14th) takes the bonus prize.

I've included swipe copy down below... so do a quick cut-and-past and get your email queued up
